text: 4106 - مَا رَوَاهُ اَلْقَاسِمُ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ بْنِ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : فِي رَجُلٍ رَهَنَ رَهْناً إِلَى وَقْتٍ ثُمَّ غَابَ هَلْ لَهُ وَقْتٌ يُبَاعُ فِيهِ رَهْنُهُ فَقَالَ "لاَ حَتَّى يَجِيءَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4106 - Al-Qasim ibn Sulaiman narrated from Ubayd ibn Zurara, who reported from Abu Abdullah (as) regarding a man who pledged a security (rahn) for a specified time and then disappeared, should there be a time set to sell his pledge?"
Imam (as) replied: "No, it should not be sold until he returns."
